speaker: Solen
text: Don't be afraid. You were brought here because you are needed. Both of you.

speaker: Solen
text: He lives. He is where he must be — as you are where you must be.

speaker: Solen
text: Time separated you. Time will reunite you. But first... the King must fall.

speaker: Solen
text: A guide. That is all you need to know for now.
